name: Metal Bin Small Open Front Green - Brightroom™
description:
Maintain a neat and organized space in your home with this Open Front Small Metal Bin from Brightroom™. Made with metal in a green hue, this square storage bin features a spacious design with an open-front cutout to make it easy to stash away toys, blankets and more. Plus, the side cut-out handles on either side make it portable and easy to carry around the home. Suitable to place on any shelf or closet, this green metal bin mixes well with various decor styles and color palettes.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
